text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our first race of the classic year is here—the
Kyodo News Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Over the last six months, her friendships with her
rivals have deepened, so when she hears their
cheers, her determination soars.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her challenge to take on the Japan Cup starts
now!
